Video Streaming Service API
Auth
POST/auth/registerPOST/auth/loginPOST/auth/refreshGET/auth/mePOST/auth/logoutPOST/auth/logout-all
Account
POST/auth/verify-email/sendPOST/auth/verify-emailPOST/auth/forgot-passwordPOST/auth/reset-passwordPOST/me/change-password
Videos
GET/videosPOST/videos/uploadGET/videos/{id}DELETE/videos/{id}GET/videos/{id}/status
Streaming
GET/videos/{id}/hls/master.m3u8GET/videos/{id}/hls/{quality}/playlist.m3u8GET/videos/{id}/hls/{quality}/{segment}GET/videos/{id}/stream/{quality}GET/videos/{id}/thumbnail
Social
GET/videos/{id}/commentsPOST/videos/{id}/commentsGET/comments/{id}/repliesPATCH/comments/{id}DELETE/comments/{id}POST/users/{id}/subscribeDELETE/users/{id}/subscribeGET/users/{id}/subscribersGET/me/subscriptionsPOST/playlistsGET/playlists/{id}PATCH/playlists/{id}DELETE/playlists/{id}GET/playlists/{id}/videosPOST/playlists/{id}/videosDELETE/playlists/{id}/videos/{videoId}GET/me/playlistsGET/me/notificationsGET/me/notifications/unread-countPOST/me/notifications/read-allPOST/me/notifications/{id}/read
Discovery
GET/searchGET/search/suggestGET/categoriesGET/videos/trendingGET/videos/{id}/relatedGET/me/feed
Engagement
POST/videos/{id}/viewPOST/videos/{id}/progressGET/videos/{id}/likePUT/videos/{id}/likeDELETE/videos/{id}/likePUT/videos/{id}/watch-laterDELETE/videos/{id}/watch-laterGET/me/watch-laterGET/me/historyDELETE/me/historyDELETE/me/history/{videoId}
Moderation
POST/reportsGET/admin/reports/pendingPOST/admin/reports/{id}/reviewPOST/admin/users/{id}/banPOST/admin/users/{id}/unban
Admin
POST/admin/videos/{id}/retryDELETE/admin/videos/{id}/cacheGET/admin/queue/statsGET/admin/workersGET/admin/analytics/dashboardGET/admin/analytics/realtimeGET/admin/analytics/top-videosGET/admin/analytics/videos/{id}GET/admin/analytics/videos/{id}/viewsGET/admin/monitoring/metricsGET/admin/monitoring/systemGET/admin/monitoring/queueGET/admin/monitoring/databaseGET/admin/monitoring/redis
Ops
GET/healthGET/metricsGET/docsGET/openapi.yaml
Schemas
SuccessEnvelopePaginatedEnvelopePaginationMetaErrorResponseErrorDetailMessageResponseRoleVideoStatusVideoVisibilityReportTypeNotificationTypeTokenPairTokenPairResponseUserUserResponseVideoVideoResponseVideoStatusReportViewResultLikeCommentSubscriptionEntryPlaylistPlaylistVideoPlaylistItemWatchLaterItemWatchHistoryNotificationVideoSearchItemCategoryCountContentReportQueueStatsWorkerInfoDashboardStatsVideoAnalyticsCountryStatsRealtimeMetricsTimeSeriesDataDataPointSystemMetricsQueueMetricsDatabaseMetricsRedisMetricsHealthStatus

Video Streaming Service API

Version 1.0.0 · OpenAPI 3.1.0 · raw spec: /openapi.yaml

Standalone JSON API for a video platform: accounts, uploads, transcoding, HLS/MP4 playback, comments, playlists, subscriptions, search, moderation and admin analytics. It is designed to be hosted on its own and consumed by a separate frontend (React, Next.js, Vue, ...) running on a different origin.

The three things to know first

  1. Auth is JWT Bearer. Log in at POST /auth/login (the body field is identifier — a username or an email — plus password) and send Authorization: Bearer <access_token> on every authenticated call. Access tokens live 900 s; exchange the refresh_token at POST /auth/refresh for a new pair. A refresh token is not usable as an API credential, and an access token is rejected at /auth/refresh.
  2. Every JSON response is wrapped in an envelope. Success: {"success": true, "data": ...}. Lists (including /search): {"success": true, "data": [...], "pagination": {"total", "page", "limit", "total_pages", "has_next", "has_previous"}}. Errors: {"success": false, "error": {"code": "...", "message": "..."}}. Media routes (.m3u8, .ts, MP4, JPEG) return raw bytes, never the envelope.
  3. Media URLs come back on the video object. A ready video exposes computed hls_url (feed it to hls.js / Safari) and thumbnail_url. Server-side storage paths are deliberately withheld. Range requests are honoured on /videos/{id}/stream/{quality} (206 Partial Content), and CORS exposes Content-Length, Content-Range, Accept-Ranges and X-Request-ID so hls.js and seeking work cross-origin.

Other conventions

  • The canonical prefix is /api/v1. Bare /api is a legacy alias onto the same handlers; new integrations should use /api/v1.
  • Pagination: page (default 1, min 1) and limit (default 20, max 100), clamped silently. Exception: /admin/analytics/top-videos defaults to 10, caps at 50, and rejects a malformed limit with 400.
  • **Private videos and playlists answer 404 — never 403 — to anyone but their owner**, on every read and every media route, so their existence is not leaked. unlisted content is reachable by anyone with the link.
  • Playback does not auto-count views. Record a view explicitly with POST /videos/{id}/view (anonymous callers must send a session_id); it answers 201 when counted and 200 when deduplicated.
  • Roles: guest, user, premium, moderator, admin. Admin accounts are bootstrapped with the cmd/admin CLI (admin promote --username alice --role admin), not raw SQL.
  • CORS origins are allowlisted server-side; allowed request headers include Authorization, Content-Type and Range.

Servers

URLDescription
http://localhost:8080/api/v1Local development
{scheme}://{host}/api/v1Production

Auth

Register, log in, refresh, and end sessions.

POST /auth/register

Create an account and return tokens no auth required

Registers a new account and immediately returns a token pair, so no separate login round-trip is needed. Usernames must match ^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{3,30}$.

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
username requiredstring
min length 3, max length 30, pattern ^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{3,30}$
email requiredstring (email)
password requiredstring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
201Account createdapplication/json — TokenPairResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
403The account is banned (USER_BANNED)application/json — ErrorResponse
409Username or email already taken (ALREADY_EXISTS)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /auth/login

Exchange credentials for tokens no auth required

The credential field is identifier, not username — it accepts a username or an email. Unknown account and wrong password return the same 401 body, so account existence cannot be probed.

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
identifier requiredstringUsername or email
password requiredstring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Token pairapplication/json — TokenPairResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403The account is banned (USER_BANNED)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /auth/refresh

Exchange a refresh token for a new token pair no auth required

Takes {"refresh_token": "..."} and returns a full new token pair. An access token presented here is rejected with 401, just as a refresh token presented as an API credential is rejected with 401.

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
refresh_token requiredstring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200New token pairapplication/json — TokenPairResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Invalid, expired or revoked refresh token — or an access token was presentedapplication/json — ErrorResponse

GET /auth/me

Return the authenticated caller's own account requires bearer token

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The caller's accountapplication/json — UserResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /auth/logout

Revoke the presented access token requires bearer token

Revokes the access token in the Authorization header. The body is optional; when it carries a refresh_token, that token is revoked too.

Request body (optional)

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
refresh_tokenstring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Logged outapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /auth/logout-all

Revoke every outstanding session for the caller, on every device requires bearer token

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200All sessions revokedapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

Account

Email verification, password recovery and password change.

POST /auth/verify-email/send

(Re)send a verification email requires bearer token

Sends the verification mail to the caller's own registered address.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Verification email sentapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse
409Address already verified (EMAIL_ALREADY_VERIFIED)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /auth/verify-email

Consume a verification token and mark the account verified no auth required

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
token requiredstring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Email verifiedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Bad or expired token (INVALID_TOKEN) or malformed body (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /auth/forgot-password

Start a password reset no auth required

Always answers 200 with the same body whether or not the address is registered, so accounts cannot be enumerated.

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
email requiredstring (email)

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Accepted (same body regardless of whether the address exists)application/json — MessageResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /auth/reset-password

Consume a reset token and set a new password no auth required

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
token requiredstring
password requiredstring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Password reset; log in again with the new passwordapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Bad token (INVALID_TOKEN) or weak password (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /me/change-password

Change password after verifying the current one requires bearer token

Carries the stricter auth rate limit on top of the normal API budget.

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
current_password requiredstring
new_password requiredstring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Password changedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Wrong current password (INVALID_CURRENT_PASSWORD) or weak new password (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

Videos

Video metadata — list, read, upload, delete, processing status.

GET /videos

List videos no auth required

Auth is optional. Anonymous callers see only public videos; with a token and mine=true the filter switches to the caller's own videos, all visibilities included.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100
searchquerystring
statusqueryVideoStatus
minequerystring: true"true" lists the caller's own videos (requires a token)

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of videosapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of Video
500Internal error (INTERNAL_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /videos/upload

Upload a video for transcoding requires bearer token

Multipart upload, queued for transcoding by the worker. Requires the upload_video permission and carries an extra upload rate limit. Title 1–255 chars. The size limit is deployment-configured (STORAGE_MAX_FILE_SIZE, default 2 GiB; hard ceiling 10 GiB). The response video starts in status uploading — poll GET /videos/{id}/status for progress.

Request body

multipart/form-data
FieldTypeDescription
video requiredstring (binary)The video file
title requiredstring
min length 1, max length 255
descriptionstring
visibilityVideoVisibility

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
201Video accepted (status uploading)application/json — VideoResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
413File exceeds the configured size limit (FILE_TOO_LARGE)application/json — ErrorResponse
415Not an accepted video format (INVALID_FORMAT)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /videos/{id}

Get one video no auth required

Auth is optional; a token lets the owner read their own private video. Private videos answer 404 — never 403 — to everyone else, so their existence is not leaked. Unlisted videos resolve for anyone with the link. A ready video carries hls_url and thumbnail_url for playback.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The videoapplication/json — VideoResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /videos/{id}

Delete a video requires bearer token

Owner only, unless the caller holds delete_any_video (checked in the handler).

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Video deletedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /videos/{id}/status

Transcoding progress for a video no auth required

Poll this after an upload. Auth is optional; private videos 404 for non-owners exactly like GET /videos/{id}.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Processing statusapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: VideoStatusReport
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

Streaming

Raw media: HLS playlists and segments, progressive MP4 (Range → 206), and thumbnails. These routes return bytes, not the JSON envelope.

GET /videos/{id}/hls/master.m3u8

HLS master playlist no auth required

Feed this URL (it comes back as hls_url on the video object) to hls.js or a native HLS player. Auth is optional; a private video 404s for non-owners. Returns raw m3u8 text — not the JSON envelope. Cached public, max-age=3600. Streaming routes carry a much higher rate-limit budget than the rest of the API.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Master playlistapplication/vnd.apple.mpegurl — string
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Video not found / not visible (NOT_FOUND), transcoding not finished (HLS_NOT_READY), or playlist missing (PLAYLIST_NOT_FOUND)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /videos/{id}/hls/{quality}/playlist.m3u8

HLS media playlist for one quality no auth required

Auth optional; private videos 404 for non-owners. Raw m3u8 text.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id
quality requiredpathstring: 360p | 480p | 720p | 1080pRendition quality

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Media playlistapplication/vnd.apple.mpegurl — string
400Quality not one of 360p|480p|720p|1080p (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404NOT_FOUND, HLS_NOT_READY or PLAYLIST_NOT_FOUNDapplication/json — ErrorResponse

GET /videos/{id}/hls/{quality}/{segment}

HLS segment no auth required

MPEG-TS bytes with immutable cache headers (max-age=31536000, immutable). Served via http.ServeContent, so Range requests answer 206. Auth optional; private videos 404 for non-owners.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id
quality requiredpathstring: 360p | 480p | 720p | 1080pRendition quality
segment requiredpathstringSegment file name; must match ^segment_\d{3}\.ts$

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Segment bytesvideo/MP2T — string (binary)
206Partial content for a Range requestvideo/MP2T — string (binary)
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404SEGMENT_NOT_FOUND or HLS_NOT_READYapplication/json — ErrorResponse

GET /videos/{id}/stream/{quality}

Progressive MP4 fallback no auth required

Plain MP4 for players without HLS. Honours Range and answers 206, which is what makes seeking work; CORS exposes Content-Range and Accept-Ranges so this works cross-origin. The quality must be present in the video's available_qualities and the video must be ready. Auth optional; private videos 404 for non-owners.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id
quality requiredpathstring: 360p | 480p | 720p | 1080pRendition quality
RangeheaderstringStandard byte range, e.g. bytes=0-1023

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Whole filevideo/mp4 — string (binary)
206Partial content for a Range request (with Content-Range)video/mp4 — string (binary)
400Quality invalid or not in available_qualities (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404NOT_FOUND, VIDEO_NOT_READY or FILE_NOT_FOUNDapplication/json — ErrorResponse

GET /videos/{id}/thumbnail

Poster image no auth required

JPEG with immutable cache headers (max-age=86400). A thumbnail is a frame of the video, so it is exactly as private as the video: same visibility check, private 404s for non-owners. This URL comes back as thumbnail_url on the video object.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200JPEG bytesimage/jpeg — string (binary)
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Video not visible, or thumbnail not generated yet (NOT_FOUND)application/json — ErrorResponse

Social

Comments, subscriptions, playlists and notifications.

GET /videos/{id}/comments

Page of a video's top-level comments, pinned first no auth required

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of commentsapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of Comment
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /videos/{id}/comments

Post a comment or a reply requires bearer token

Set parent_id to reply; the parent must be a comment on the same video.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
content requiredstring
min length 1, max length 10000
parent_idstring (uuid)

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
201The created commentapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: Comment
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Video or parent comment not found (NOT_FOUND)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /comments/{id}/replies

Page of a comment's replies, oldest first no auth required

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Comment id
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of repliesapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of Comment
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

PATCH /comments/{id}

Edit a comment's content (author only) requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Comment id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
content requiredstring
min length 1, max length 10000

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The updated commentapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: Comment
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /comments/{id}

Soft-delete a comment requires bearer token

Allowed for the comment's author, the video's owner, or a caller with moderate_content — resolved inside the handler.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Comment id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Comment deletedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /users/{id}/subscribe

Subscribe to a creator (idempotent) requires bearer token

Subscribing to yourself is a 400.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)User id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Subscribedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Self-subscription (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /users/{id}/subscribe

Remove the caller's subscription to a creator requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)User id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Unsubscribedapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Not subscribed (NOT_FOUND)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /users/{id}/subscribers

Page of a creator's subscribers no auth required

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)User id
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of subscribersapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of SubscriptionEntry
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /me/subscriptions

Creators the caller follows requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of subscriptionsapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of SubscriptionEntry
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /playlists

Create a playlist owned by the caller requires bearer token

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
title requiredstring
min length 1, max length 255
descriptionstring
visibilityVideoVisibility

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
201The created playlistapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: Playlist
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /playlists/{id}

Get a playlist no auth required

Auth is optional. A private playlist resolves only for its owner; everyone else gets 404 (never 403).

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Playlist id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The playlistapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: Playlist
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

PATCH /playlists/{id}

Edit playlist metadata (owner only) requires bearer token

All fields optional, but at least one must be present.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Playlist id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
titlestring
min length 1, max length 255
descriptionstring
visibilityVideoVisibility

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The updated playlistapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: Playlist
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /playlists/{id}

Delete a playlist (owner only) requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Playlist id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Playlist deletedapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /playlists/{id}/videos

A playlist's videos in position order no auth required

Auth is optional; visibility follows the playlist — a private playlist 404s for non-owners.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Playlist id
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of playlist itemsapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of PlaylistItem
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /playlists/{id}/videos

Append a video to the end of a playlist (owner only) requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Playlist id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
video_id requiredstring (uuid)

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
201The playlist entryapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: PlaylistVideo
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Playlist or video not found (NOT_FOUND / PLAYLIST_NOT_FOUND)application/json — ErrorResponse
409Already in the playlist (ALREADY_IN_PLAYLIST)application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /playlists/{id}/videos/{videoId}

Remove a video from a playlist (owner only) requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Playlist id
videoId requiredpathstring (uuid)

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Removedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /me/playlists

The caller's playlists, private ones included requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of playlistsapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of Playlist
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /me/notifications

The caller's notifications, newest first requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
unreadquerystring: true"true" narrows to unread notifications
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of notificationsapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of Notification
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /me/notifications/unread-count

Unread notification count for badge rendering requires bearer token

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Unread countapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: object { unread_count: integer }
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /me/notifications/read-all

Mark every unread notification read requires bearer token

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200All marked read; marked counts how manyapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: object { message: string, marked: integer }
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /me/notifications/{id}/read

Mark one notification read requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Notification id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Marked readapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

Discovery

Search, suggestions, categories, trending, related and the subscription feed.

GET /search

Full-text video search no auth required

Searches public, ready videos. Answers in the standard paginated envelope like every other list endpoint.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
q requiredquerystring
sortquerystring: relevance | newest | views | likes
categoryquerystring
languagequerystring
tagsquerystringComma-separated tag list
min_durationqueryintegerSeconds; must be >= 0
max_durationqueryintegerSeconds; must be >= 0
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of search resultsapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of VideoSearchItem
400Missing q, unknown sort, or negative duration (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /search/suggest

Up to ten title suggestions for autocomplete no auth required

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
q requiredquerystring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Plain array of suggestion strings (not paginated)application/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: array of string
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /categories

Distinct categories in use, with video counts no auth required

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Plain array of categories (not paginated)application/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: array of CategoryCount

GET /videos/trending

Most engaged-with public videos inside a time window no auth required

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
windowquerystring: 24h | 7d | 30d
limitqueryinteger

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Plain array of videos (not paginated)application/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: array of VideoSearchItem
400Unknown window (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /videos/{id}/related

Videos similar by shared tags/category, topped up from trending no auth required

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id
limitqueryinteger

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Plain array of videos (not paginated)application/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: array of VideoSearchItem
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /me/feed

Videos from creators the caller subscribes to, newest first requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of feed itemsapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of VideoSearchItem
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

Engagement

Views, resume progress, likes, watch-later and watch history.

POST /videos/{id}/view

Record one view (explicit — playback does not auto-count) no auth required

Views are deduplicated in Redis. Auth is optional: authenticated callers are deduped by user id; anonymous callers must send a session_id. The body must be JSON, even if just {} for an authenticated caller. 201 = counted, 200 = deduplicated repeat.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
qualitystring
sourcestring
session_idstringRequired for anonymous callers

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
201View countedapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: ViewResult
200Duplicate within the dedupe window — not countedapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: ViewResult
400Missing session_id for an anonymous caller, or non-JSON body (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /videos/{id}/progress

Upsert the caller's resume position requires bearer token

position and duration are non-negative seconds and position must lie within duration, otherwise the request is a 400.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
positionintegerSeconds; must not exceed duration
min 0
durationintegerSeconds
min 0
completedboolean

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Progress savedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Negative values, or position beyond duration (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /videos/{id}/like

Get the caller's current rating of a video requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The caller's ratingapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: Like
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Not rated (NOT_FOUND)application/json — ErrorResponse

PUT /videos/{id}/like

Upsert the caller's rating requires bearer token

is_like: false is a dislike. The field is a pointer server-side, so the key must be present explicitly — true or false.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
is_like requiredbooleantrue = like, false = dislike; the key is required

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The stored ratingapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: Like
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /videos/{id}/like

Clear the caller's rating of a video requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Rating removedapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Not rated (NOT_FOUND)application/json — ErrorResponse

PUT /videos/{id}/watch-later

Save a video to watch-later (idempotent) requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Savedapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /videos/{id}/watch-later

Remove a video from watch-later requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Removedapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Not in the list (NOT_FOUND)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /me/watch-later

The caller's watch-later list, most recently saved first requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of saved videosapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of WatchLaterItem
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /me/history

Watch history, most recently watched first requires bearer token

An empty history serialises as [], never null.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of history entriesapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of WatchHistory
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /me/history

Delete the caller's entire watch history requires bearer token

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200History clearedapplication/json — MessageResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /me/history/{videoId}

Remove one video from the caller's watch history requires bearer token

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
videoId requiredpathstring (uuid)

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Entry removedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

Moderation

User-filed reports, report review, and user bans.

POST /reports

File a report against a video, user, or comment requires bearer token

Any authenticated user may report. At least one of video_id, user_id, comment_id is required. Filing the same report twice is a 409.

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
report_type requiredReportType
reason requiredstring
descriptionstring
video_idstring (uuid)
user_idstring (uuid)
comment_idstring (uuid)

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
201The filed reportapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: ContentReport
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
409Same reporter, same target (DUPLICATE_REPORT)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/reports/pending

Page of reports awaiting review requires bearer token

Requires the moderate_content permission.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
pagequeryinteger1-based page number; values below 1 are clamped to 1
limitqueryintegerPage size; clamped to at most 100

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Page of pending reportsapplication/json — PaginatedEnvelope · data: array of ContentReport
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /admin/reports/{id}/review

Resolve or dismiss a report requires bearer token

Requires moderate_content. action: ban_user additionally requires manage_users (checked in the handler) — without it the review is a 403.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Report id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
action requiredstring: delete_video | ban_user | warn_user | dismiss
notesstring

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Report reviewedapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: object { message: string, report_id: string (uuid), action: string }
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Missing moderate_content, or ban_user without manage_users (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /admin/users/{id}/ban

Ban a user requires bearer token

Requires manage_users. Empty duration means permanent; a duration is a positive Go duration string like "72h". Banning yourself is rejected.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)User id

Request body

application/json
FieldTypeDescription
reason requiredstring
durationstringPositive Go duration string, e.g. "72h". Omit for a permanent ban.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200User bannedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Self-ban or bad duration (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

POST /admin/users/{id}/unban

Lift a ban requires bearer token

Requires manage_users.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)User id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200User unbannedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

Admin

Queue operations, platform analytics and infrastructure monitoring.

POST /admin/videos/{id}/retry

Re-queue a failed video for transcoding requires bearer token

Requires moderate_content. Only a video in status failed may be retried; any other status is a 400.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Retry initiatedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Video is not in status failed (BAD_REQUEST) or bad id (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

DELETE /admin/videos/{id}/cache

Flush the cached HLS playlists for a video requires bearer token

Requires moderate_content.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Cache clearedapplication/json — MessageResponse
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/queue/stats

Asynq default-queue statistics requires bearer token

Requires moderate_content.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Queue statisticsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: QueueStats
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/workers

Active Asynq worker servers requires bearer token

Requires moderate_content.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Active workersapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: object { workers: array of WorkerInfo, count: integer }
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/analytics/dashboard

Platform-wide overview requires bearer token

Requires view_analytics.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Dashboard statisticsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: DashboardStats
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/analytics/realtime

Live counters, always uncached requires bearer token

Requires view_analytics.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Realtime metricsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: RealtimeMetrics
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/analytics/top-videos

Most-viewed videos of the past week requires bearer token

Requires view_analytics. Unlike the shared pagination, limit here defaults to 10, caps at 50, and a malformed value is a 400 rather than being defaulted.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
limitqueryinteger

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Plain array of video analytics (not paginated)application/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: array of VideoAnalytics
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/analytics/videos/{id}

Engagement breakdown for one video requires bearer token

Requires view_analytics.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Video analyticsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: VideoAnalytics
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/analytics/videos/{id}/views

View count time series for a video requires bearer token

Requires view_analytics.

Parameters

NameInTypeDescription
id requiredpathstring (uuid)Video id
intervalquerystring: hour | day | week | month

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Time seriesapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: TimeSeriesData
400Malformed input (VALIDATION_ERROR)application/json — ErrorResponse
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse
404Resource not found (NOT_FOUND). Also the answer for a private video or playlist read by anyone but its owner — never 403.application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/monitoring/metrics

All operational metrics in one payload requires bearer token

Requires manage_users (admin-only surface).

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Combined metricsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: object { system: SystemMetrics, queue: QueueMetrics, database: DatabaseMetrics, redis: RedisMetrics }
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/monitoring/system

Host CPU / memory / disk / goroutines requires bearer token

Requires manage_users.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200System metricsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: SystemMetrics
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/monitoring/queue

Job queue metrics requires bearer token

Requires manage_users.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Queue metricsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: QueueMetrics
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/monitoring/database

Postgres pool and table metrics requires bearer token

Requires manage_users.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Database metricsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: DatabaseMetrics
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

GET /admin/monitoring/redis

Redis memory / keys / hit-rate metrics requires bearer token

Requires manage_users.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Redis metricsapplication/json — SuccessEnvelope · data: RedisMetrics
401Missing, invalid, expired or revoked access token (UNAUTHORIZED)application/json — ErrorResponse
403Authenticated, but lacking the required permission (FORBIDDEN)application/json — ErrorResponse

Ops

Health, Prometheus metrics and this documentation. Served at the server root, outside /api/v1.

GET /health

Readiness probe no auth required server root (not /api/v1)

Mounted at the server root, not under /api/v1. Returns 503 when Postgres or Redis is unreachable, so an orchestrator can pull the instance out of rotation. Not wrapped in the JSON envelope.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Healthyapplication/json — HealthStatus
503A dependency is unreachableapplication/json — HealthStatus

GET /metrics

Prometheus exposition no auth required server root (not /api/v1)

Mounted at the server root. Plain-text Prometheus format.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200Prometheus metricstext/plain — string

GET /docs

This API reference, as a self-contained HTML page no auth required server root (not /api/v1)

Mounted at the server root. The page embeds all of its CSS and JS — no CDN assets — so it renders behind a strict CSP or with no egress.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The documentation pagetext/html — string

GET /openapi.yaml

This specification, raw no auth required server root (not /api/v1)

Mounted at the server root.

Responses

StatusDescriptionBody
200The OpenAPI documentapplication/yaml — string

Schemas

SuccessEnvelope

Every non-media, non-list success response: {"success": true, "data": ...}

FieldTypeDescription
success requiredboolean
always True
dataanyThe payload; its shape is documented per endpoint

PaginatedEnvelope

Every list endpoint — including /search — wraps its page in this envelope.

FieldTypeDescription
success requiredboolean
always True
data requiredarray of any
pagination requiredPaginationMeta

PaginationMeta

FieldTypeDescription
totalinteger
pageinteger
limitinteger
total_pagesinteger
has_nextboolean
has_previousboolean

ErrorResponse

Every error: {"success": false, "error": {"code", "message"}}

FieldTypeDescription
success requiredboolean
always False
error requiredErrorDetail

ErrorDetail

FieldTypeDescription
code requiredstring: VALIDATION_ERROR | BAD_REQUEST | UNAUTHORIZED | FORBIDDEN | NOT_FOUND | INTERNAL_ERROR | ALREADY_EXISTS | USER_BANNED | DUPLICATE_REPORT | EMAIL_ALREADY_VERIFIED | INVALID_TOKEN | INVALID_CURRENT_PASSWORD | FILE_TOO_LARGE | INVALID_FORMAT | HLS_NOT_READY | PLAYLIST_NOT_FOUND | SEGMENT_NOT_FOUND | VIDEO_NOT_READY | FILE_NOT_FOUND | ALREADY_IN_PLAYLIST | AUTH_UNAVAILABLEMachine-readable error code. AUTH_UNAVAILABLE arrives with status 503 when the token-revocation store is unreachable and the server fails closed — retry with the same token rather than discarding credentials as you would on a 401.
message requiredstringHuman-readable explanation

MessageResponse

A success envelope whose payload is a short confirmation

Extends SuccessEnvelope

FieldTypeDescription
dataobject { message: string }

Role

string: guest | user | premium | moderator | admin

VideoStatus

string: uploading | processing | ready | failed

VideoVisibility

private answers 404 to everyone but the owner; unlisted is reachable by anyone with the link but excluded from listings and search.

string: public | private | unlisted

ReportType

string: spam | harassment | hate_speech | violence | copyright | nudity | misinformation | other

NotificationType

string: new_video | comment | reply | like | subscriber | mention

TokenPair

FieldTypeDescription
access_tokenstringJWT; send as Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
refresh_tokenstringRedeem at POST /auth/refresh; not usable as an API credential
token_typestring
always Bearer
expires_inintegerAccess-token lifetime in seconds (900)
refresh_expires_inintegerRefresh-token lifetime in seconds (604800)
userUser

TokenPairResponse

Extends SuccessEnvelope

FieldTypeDescription
dataTokenPair

User

Password hashes, verification/reset tokens and moderation bookkeeping are never serialized.

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
usernamestring
emailstring (email)
full_namestring
biostring
avatar_urlstring
roleRole
email_verifiedboolean
last_login_atstring (date-time)
oauth_providerstring
oauth_avatar_urlstring
is_bannedboolean
ban_reasonstring
ban_expirystring (date-time)
banned_atstring (date-time)
created_atstring (date-time)
updated_atstring (date-time)

UserResponse

Extends SuccessEnvelope

FieldTypeDescription
dataUser

Video

Server-side storage keys (file path, HLS path, thumbnail path) are deliberately withheld; play the video via the computed hls_url and thumbnail_url.

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
user_idstring (uuid)
titlestring
descriptionstring
filenamestring
file_sizeinteger (int64)
durationintegerSeconds
statusVideoStatus
visibilityVideoVisibility
mime_typestring
original_resolutionstring
transcoding_progressinteger
min 0, max 100
available_qualitiesarray of stringSubset of ["360p", "480p", "720p", "1080p"]
hls_readyboolean
streaming_protocolstring
categorystring
tagsarray of string
languagestring
view_countinteger (int64)
like_countinteger (int64)
comment_countinteger (int64)
created_atstring (date-time)
updated_atstring (date-time)
processed_atstring (date-time)
thumbnail_urlstringComputed; present once a thumbnail exists. /api/v1/videos/{id}/thumbnail
hls_urlstringComputed; present once HLS is ready. Feed to hls.js / native HLS. /api/v1/videos/{id}/hls/master.m3u8

VideoResponse

Extends SuccessEnvelope

FieldTypeDescription
dataVideo

VideoStatusReport

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
statusVideoStatus
progressinteger
min 0, max 100
available_qualitiesarray of string
messagestring
thumbnailstringServer-side storage key; present only once a thumbnail is set

ViewResult

FieldTypeDescription
countedbooleantrue when the view was counted (201); false on a deduplicated repeat (200)

Like

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
user_idstring (uuid)
video_idstring (uuid)
is_likebooleantrue = like, false = dislike
created_atstring (date-time)

Comment

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
video_idstring (uuid)
user_idstring (uuid)
parent_idstring (uuid)
contentstring
like_countinteger (int64)
reply_countinteger (int64)
pinnedboolean
edited_atstring (date-time)
created_atstring (date-time)
updated_atstring (date-time)
deleted_atstring (date-time)
usernamestring
avatar_urlstring

SubscriptionEntry

FieldTypeDescription
user_idstring (uuid)
usernamestring
avatar_urlstring
subscriber_countinteger (int64)
notify_uploadsboolean
subscribed_atstring (date-time)

Playlist

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
user_idstring (uuid)
titlestring
descriptionstring
visibilityVideoVisibility
video_countinteger (int64)
created_atstring (date-time)
updated_atstring (date-time)

PlaylistVideo

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
playlist_idstring (uuid)
video_idstring (uuid)
positioninteger
added_atstring (date-time)

PlaylistItem

FieldTypeDescription
positioninteger
added_atstring (date-time)
videoVideo

WatchLaterItem

FieldTypeDescription
added_atstring (date-time)
videoVideo

WatchHistory

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
user_idstring (uuid)
video_idstring (uuid)
watched_atstring (date-time)
watch_durationinteger
completedboolean
last_positioninteger

Notification

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
user_idstring (uuid)
typeNotificationType
titlestring
messagestring
action_urlstring
actor_idstring (uuid)
video_idstring (uuid)
comment_idstring (uuid)
readboolean
created_atstring (date-time)

VideoSearchItem

FieldTypeDescription
video_idstring (uuid)
titlestring
descriptionstring
thumbnail_urlstring
durationintegerSeconds
viewsinteger (int64)
created_atstring (date-time)
usernamestring
user_idstring (uuid)
user_avatar_urlstring
user_verifiedboolean
relevancenumber
snippetstring

CategoryCount

FieldTypeDescription
categorystring
video_countinteger (int64)

ContentReport

FieldTypeDescription
idstring (uuid)
video_idstring (uuid)
user_idstring (uuid)
comment_idstring (uuid)
reporter_idstring (uuid)
report_typeReportType
reasonstring
descriptionstring
statusstring: pending | reviewing | resolved | dismissed
reviewed_bystring (uuid)
reviewed_atstring (date-time)
actionstring
created_atstring (date-time)
updated_atstring (date-time)

QueueStats

FieldTypeDescription
activeinteger
pendinginteger
scheduledinteger
retryinteger
archivedinteger
completedinteger
aggregatinginteger
processedinteger
failedinteger
pausedboolean
sizeinteger

WorkerInfo

FieldTypeDescription
hoststring
pidinteger
server_idstring
concurrencyinteger
queuesobject
startedstring (date-time)
active_tasksinteger

DashboardStats

FieldTypeDescription
total_usersinteger (int64)
new_users_todayinteger (int64)
new_users_this_weekinteger (int64)
active_users_24hinteger (int64)
total_videosinteger (int64)
videos_todayinteger (int64)
videos_this_weekinteger (int64)
processing_videosinteger (int64)
failed_videosinteger (int64)
total_viewsinteger (int64)
views_todayinteger (int64)
views_this_weekinteger (int64)
total_storage_bytesinteger (int64)
storage_used_gbnumber
queued_jobsinteger (int64)
active_workersinteger (int64)
premium_usersinteger (int64)
monthly_revenuenumber
last_updatedstring (date-time)

VideoAnalytics

FieldTypeDescription
video_idstring (uuid)
titlestring
user_idstring (uuid)
usernamestring
total_viewsinteger (int64)
unique_viewersinteger (int64)
likesinteger (int64)
dislikesinteger (int64)
commentsinteger (int64)
sharesinteger (int64)
total_watch_timeinteger (int64)
avg_watch_timenumber
avg_watch_percentnumber
views_by_qualityobject
avg_buffer_timenumber
playback_errorsinteger (int64)
source_directinteger (int64)
source_searchinteger (int64)
source_embedinteger (int64)
source_socialinteger (int64)
top_countriesarray of CountryStats
device_mobileinteger (int64)
device_desktopinteger (int64)
device_tabletinteger (int64)
created_atstring (date-time)
last_viewedstring (date-time)

CountryStats

FieldTypeDescription
countrystring
viewsinteger (int64)

RealtimeMetrics

FieldTypeDescription
active_viewersinteger (int64)
uploads_last_hourinteger (int64)
views_last_hourinteger (int64)
current_cpunumber
current_memorynumber
queued_jobsinteger (int64)
processing_jobsinteger (int64)
timestampstring (date-time)

TimeSeriesData

FieldTypeDescription
labelstring
datapointsarray of DataPoint

DataPoint

FieldTypeDescription
timestampstring (date-time)
valuenumber

SystemMetrics

FieldTypeDescription
cpu_percentnumber
memory_totalinteger (int64)
memory_usedinteger (int64)
memory_percentnumber
disk_totalinteger (int64)
disk_usedinteger (int64)
disk_percentnumber
goroutinesinteger
uptimeinteger (int64)Serialized as integer nanoseconds (Go time.Duration)
timestampstring (date-time)

QueueMetrics

FieldTypeDescription
pending_jobsinteger (int64)
active_jobsinteger (int64)
failed_jobsinteger (int64)
retry_queueinteger (int64)
archived_jobsinteger (int64)
processed_lastinteger (int64)
timestampstring (date-time)

DatabaseMetrics

FieldTypeDescription
active_connectionsinteger
idle_connectionsinteger
max_connectionsinteger
slow_queriesinteger (int64)
total_queriesinteger (int64)
table_sizesobject
timestampstring (date-time)

RedisMetrics

FieldTypeDescription
memory_usedinteger (int64)
memory_peakinteger (int64)
total_keysinteger (int64)
hitsinteger (int64)
missesinteger (int64)
hit_ratenumber
connected_clientsinteger
timestampstring (date-time)

HealthStatus

Not wrapped in the JSON envelope

FieldTypeDescription
statusstring: healthy | unhealthy
checksobject { database: boolean, redis: boolean }
uptimestringGo duration string, e.g. "1h2m3.4s"
timestampstring (date-time)
